items.title: Fujifilm’s compact X Half mirrorless camera delivers old-school film vibes at $300 off for Memorial Day (All-time low)
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Memorial Day sale, Amazon is offering Fujifilm’s X Half mirrorless camera for $549 shipped. This is one of the more affordable Fujifilm mirrorless cameras out there that typically goes for $849, so you’re looking at a $300 discount. It dropped to the $649 mark during the Black Friday sale last year, and today’s deal shaves an additional $100 off to mark the lowest price we have tracked for it to date. You can get this in Black, Charcoal, and Silver finishes, and they’re all down to their lowest price at $300 off. Best Buy is also matching the price for this camera as part of its Memorial Day sale, so be sure to snag it after getting more details below.

items.title: EcoFlow’s 2,048Wh DELTA 3 Max power station with alternator charger at $949 2026 low for 24 hours, more from $899
items.summary:
EcoFlow has not only launched a new RV Season Sale that will be running through Memorial Day and through the rest of the month with up to 61% discounts, but also a 24-hour flash sale with four offers. Two such offers give you deals on the brand’s portable AC/heater alongside the Smart Generator 4000, while two provide power solutions, starting with EcoFlow’s DELTA 3 Max Portable Power Station with a 500W alternator charger at $949 shipped, beating out Amazon by $50. This newer bundle may be seen here carrying an $1,848 MSRP tag, but we’ve more consistently seen it down around $999 over at Amazon throughout the year, with periods even dropped down to $949, which is only beaten by the one-time $848 low from Black Friday. Now, you can pick it up at its second-lowest tracked price (and the best rate of 2026) with $50 off its 2026 going rate and $899 off the full direct tag. Head below to check out the DELTA 3 Ultra solar bundle, and the other deals while they last.
